name: HDFC Millennia Credit Card
whyText: High online spend pattern and excellent CIBIL score increase approval odds. SHAP: income (+), utilization (-), on-time payments (+).

name: ICICI Bank Coral Credit Card
whyText: Frequent travel pattern; SHAP shows spend categories drive reward fit; approval medium due to thin file length.

name: Kotak 811 Credit Card
whyText: Entry-friendly card; SHAP indicates low risk and broad merchant fit; best for building credit history.

name: Axis Bank My Zone Credit Card
whyText: Good dining spend pattern; SHAP shows lifestyle fit; approval high due to stable income history.

name: SBI SimplyCLICK Credit Card
whyText: High online shopping pattern; SHAP indicates strong digital adoption; approval medium due to government bank criteria.
